frame_analyses.description: Right needle driver grasping needle at appropriate position, left grasper holding suture tail
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good needle orientation and grasp position

frame_analyses.description: Needle being driven through first mark on Penrose drain, left grasper stabilizing tissue
Needle passing through drain tissue, creating loop for second pass
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean passage through tissue, maintaining needle control

frame_analyses.description: Completing second pass through drain at second mark location
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Both suture marks appear to be accurately targeted

frame_analyses.description: Beginning extracorporeal knot tying with both suture ends visible outside trainer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean exit of both suture ends for external knot formation

frame_analyses.description: Multiple loops being formed extracorporeally, creating complex knot structure
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appears to be forming appropriate number of throws for security

frame_analyses.description: Using knot pusher to advance completed extracorporeal knot down to tissue surface
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth knot advancement with pusher instrument

frame_analyses.description: Final knot positioned at tissue level, preparing for suture tail cutting
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Knot appears secure and well-positioned, ready for tail trimming

confidence_rationale: Video at 2x speed makes precise penalty assessment challenging. Suture placement appears accurate to marks but exact mm deviations difficult to measure. Knot formation and completion clearly visible.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at suture marks due to camera angle and speed
Precise knot pusher technique details due to video compression
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient needle loading, accurate suture placement, proper extracorporeal knot formation, and smooth knot advancement. Total time of 48 seconds falls well within expert benchmark range.
strengths: Very fast completion time (48s vs 60-100s expert range)
Clean suture placement with no visible deviation
improvement_suggestions: Performance appears to be at expert level with minimal room for improvement
